title: Just a question about the GFOS book

wikitext:
[]: Just a question about the GFOS book             Quote Post by Zeak » Fri Sep 12, 2008 6:16 am Just got it and wanted to know was there a translation done. If not Ill give the best part of it a go at translating as there are very little words on each page.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Fri Oct 03, 2008 2:36 am Cool ill start the long painful translation process over the next few months at sea.
